title: Handle SummaryFormSuccess and SummaryFormError states in Bre-B presummary form
acceptanceCriteria: When the notifier emits SummaryFormSuccess, the module renders a success view with a primary action
When the notifier emits SummaryFormError, the module renders a GenericError with retry and back actions
Retrying from SummaryFormError reloads the presummary
The primary action on SummaryFormSuccess navigates to the summary route
Existing PresummaryFormLoading, PresummaryFormError and PresummaryFormSuccess states are unchanged
